subject: [PATCH 01/19] nfs/localio: fix nfsd_file ref leak on nfs_local_doio() init failure

2026-06-09.patch_summary: This patch fixes a reference leak in the NFS localio code by adding missing calls to nfs_local_file_put() and introducing a new cleanup label for error handling paths. The leak occurs when the function nfs_local_doio() returns early due to zero count or iocb initialization failure, causing the associated net namespace reference to be pinned and preventing network namespace teardown. The patch addresses these issues by properly releasing resources in all return paths, ensuring correct behavior and avoiding potential system crashes.
